# indexOfItem(at:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the index of the item at the specified location.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func indexOfItem(at point: NSPoint) -> Int
```

## Parameters

- **point**: The location of the item.

## Return Value

The index of the item or `NSNotFound` if no item at this location.

## Getting Item Information

- **itemFrame(at:)**: Returns the frame rectangle for the item located at the specified index.
- **visibleItemIndexes()**: Returns the indexes of the view’s currently visible items.
- **cellForItem(at:)**: Returns the browser cell for the item at the specified index.
